title: erigeron virgatus
intro: Erigeron virgatus, also known as the daisy fleabane or white fleabane, is a perennial plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is also known to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. Erigeron virgatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
